column4: Normal access; current privilege mode applies.
U-level access with HS-level translation and protection only.
HS-level access with HS-level translation and protection only.

VU-level access with two-stage translation and protection. The HS-level
MXR bit makes any executable page readable. vsstatus.MXR makes
readable those pages marked executable at the VS translation stage, but
only if readable at the guest-physical translation stage.

VS-level access with two-stage translation and protection. The HS-level
MXR bit makes any executable page readable. vsstatus.MXR makes
readable those pages marked executable at the VS translation stage, but
only if readable at the guest-physical translation stage. vsstatus.SUM
applies instead of the HS-level SUM bit.
